title: NUEVO FUTURO - 211info
text: ANTFARM NUEVO FUTURO Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access and information about many varied resources including cultural events, active parenting, suicide prevention, tobacco/vaping/alcohol cessation, credit management, HIV education, and food security. 39140 Proctor Boulevard Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as Hispanic or Latinx Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 668-7962 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 668-7962 Main phone (503) 668-9955 Alternate Main phone (503) 668-7962 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Estacada, Molalla, Sandy SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - AXIS LEARNING CENTER EMPLOYMENT - YOUTHCORE FOOD - ANTFARM LEARNING GARDENS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNITYCONNECT SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - ANTFARM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ANTFARM
